programme.title: Day 1 - Al Shaqab Cup 2026
programme.desc: The Al Shaqab Cup is a prestigious equestrian event held in Doha from 25 to 29 March 2026, bringing together elite international riders and top-level horses in high-caliber competition. Staged at the world-class Al Shaqab venue, the event showcases the sport’s excellence and international appeal through a program of top-class equestrian action.

programme.title: Day 1 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai Jumping - Round 1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The schedule includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, with riders earning points toward the season standings. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.

programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. programme.desc: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, held across Canada, Mexico, and the USA from June 11 to July 19, 2026, will be the largest ever with 48 teams and 104 matches, significantly expanding the competition format. This series provides key previews, team analysis and player profiles of the greatest show on earth.

programme.desc: All matches from the 2025–26 La Liga season are available live and exclusive only on beIN. La Liga, Spain's premier football competition, runs from 15 August 2025 until 24 May 2026. Barcelona are the defending champions, having won their 28th title the previous season.

programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. programme.title: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025
programme.desc: Live and exclusive only on beIN, the Coupe de France, also referred to as the French Cup, is the premier knockout cup competition in French football organised by the French Football Federation (FF). The winner qualifies for the group stage of the UEFA Europa League and a place in the Trophée des Champions. Current champions are Paris saint Germain.

programme.title: Paris FC vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: This match will be the fifth meeting between Paris FC and Paris Saint-Germain in all competitions, with both sides having won one and drawn two of their previous four encounters. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last 26 Ligue 1 matches against newly promoted sides, with their last such defeat coming in January 2021 against Lorient.

programme.title: Match 1 - Roland Garros - 2026 World Feed
programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. From opening-round battles to the iconic finals on Court Philippe-Chatrier, the tournament delivers two weeks of elite tennis, drama and endurance on the sport’s most demanding surface.

programme.title: Practice 1 - F1 Monaco Grand Prix - 2026
programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Practice gives the first real read on long-run pace and tyre wear, qualifying is a flat-out one-lap fight where track evolution matters, and the Grand Prix is 58 laps (306.124km) shaped by strategy, safety cars and pit windows.

programme.title: Al Sadd vs Umm Salal - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verrat

programme.title: Tours vs Paris - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: Qatar vs Ecuador - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Qatar and Ecuador have met three times previously, all matches taking place in Qatar – their head-to-head record is perfectly balanced with one win each and one draw. Their last encounter saw Qatar win 4-3 in a friendly in October 2018. Qatar are taking part in their first ever FIFA World Cup, whilst also being first nation from the Arab world to h

programme.title: Argentina vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina are unbeaten in all four of their previous meetings with Saudi Arabia, with this the first meeting between the sides at the FIFA World Cup. Argentina have qualified for their 18th FIFA World Cup, with Qatar 2022 being their 13th participation in a row, the third-longest current run after Brazil and Germany. Since 1978, only Germany have

programme.title: England vs Iran - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between England and Iran. The Islamic Republic have never beaten European opposition at the FIFA World Cup. England have qualified for the FIFA World Cup for the 16th time. It’s their seventh appearance in a row, their longest streak in the competition.

programme.title: Belgium vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the second meeting between Belgium and Morocco at the FIFA World Cup, with Belgium winning 1-0 in the other in the 1994 edition. Morocco won their last meeting with Belgium in all competitions, winning 4-1 in a friendly back in March 2008. They had lost their two games against the Belgians before this.

programme.title: Spain vs Germany - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the fifth meeting between Spain and Germany at the FIFA World Cup, the joint-most that Spain have faced any side at the competition. They failed to win any of their first three against Germany but won the most recent encounter 1-0 in the 2010 semi-final en route to lifting the trophy. Germany have won just one of their last seven meet

programme.title: Brazil vs Serbia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil have won each of their two previous encounters with Serbia, including their group stage fixture at the last FIFA World Cup. The other was a 1-0 win in a friendly back in June 2014. Brazil are the only team to have taken part in every single FIFA World Cup since its original edition in 1930; this will be their 22nd appearance.

programme.title: Brazil vs Serbia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil have won each of their two previous encounters with Serbia, including their group stage fixture at the last FIFA World Cup. The other was a 1-0 win in a friendly back in June 2014. Brazil are the only team to have taken part in every single FIFA World Cup since its original edition in 1930; this will be their 22nd appearance.

programme.title: Tunisia vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: France have never lost in four previous meetings with Tunisia, with this their first encounter since a 1-1 draw in May 2010. France have alternated between winning and losing in each of their five FIFA World Cup matches against African nations, beating Nigeria 2-0 in their last such match in 2014.

programme.title: Portugal vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Portugal and Ghana’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 2014 FIFA World Cup. Portugal won 2-1, with a Cristiano Ronaldo winning goal. Portugal have won only three of their last 14 World Cup matches, each of them coming in the group stage of the competition – their last victory in the knockout stage came in June 2006, when they p

programme.title: Netherlands vs USA - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Round Of 16
programme.desc: As part of the 1st year anniversary celebrations for the FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022, beIN are rebroadcasting the tournament exactly as it took place one year ago. All 64 games are repeated on exactly the same day at exactly the same times offering viewers the chance to experience once more the greatest FIFA World Cup of all time.
